summary: Completed frontend testing of PDF download feature for employee payslip. All tests passed. jsPDF-based PDF generation is working correctly without browser print headers.

employee_login.description: Employee can log in with testemployee/test@3210 credentials

salary_page_navigation.description: Employee can navigate to /employee/salary via sidebar 'My Salary' link

salary_page_data_display.description: Salary page displays: Monthly Net Pay ₹38,511, Annual CTC ₹6,00,000, Monthly CTC ₹50,000, Section A (Base Components), Section B (Basket of Allowances), Section C (Retirement Benefits), Section D (Deductions), Insurance Coverage

download_pdf_button_visibility.description: Download PDF button with data-testid='download-payslip-btn' is visible and enabled

pdf_download_functionality.description: PDF download triggers correctly using jsPDF, saves file with correct name format Payslip_EMP0056_2026-02.pdf

pdf_file_validity.description: Downloaded PDF is valid (24,202 bytes), contains proper content: title 'Compensation & Benefits Structure', 'Payslip for February 2026', company info 'BluBridge Technologies Pvt Ltd | Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India'. No browser print headers present.

success_toast.description: Success toast 'PDF downloaded successfully!' displays after download

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test employee with salary configured (Annual CTC ₹6,00,000)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF download feature using jsPDF is fully working. The handleDownloadPDF function in EmployeeSalary.js (lines 123-514) generates a clean PDF without browser print dialogs or headers. Filename format: Payslip_{EMP_ID}_{YYYY-MM}.pdf. Test employee EMP0056 has salary configured.

pdf_download_verification.contains_company_info: BluBridge Technologies Pvt Ltd | Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
